plan.title: packs:slice v2 -- broaden rules-pack source to AGENTS.md + main.md

narratives.Description: Broaden the rules pack source coverage beyond `coding/*` to include the directives in AGENTS.md and main.md, and capture full bodies for rule source documents beyond the single `coding/testing.md` proof. This story is marked needs_refinement because migrating the AGENTS.md managed section into a drift-checked pack projection interacts with `task agents:refresh` and the managed-section contract, so the parsing and ownership boundaries must be designed before it is concurrency-safe. The rules-pack native schema enrichment fields are explicitly out of scope here and owned by #748.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
1. Design and implement new source parsers in `scripts/pack_migrate_rules.py` that extract RFC2119 directives from AGENTS.md and main.md without colliding with the managed-section regeneration in `task agents:refresh`.
2. Capture full bodies for additional rule source documents into `packs/rules/rules-pack-0.1.json` and update `vbrief/schemas/rules-pack.schema.json` source-domain enum as needed.
3. Add migration and drift assertions to `tests/cli/test_pack_migrate_rules.py` and confirm `task verify:pack-drift` validates the broadened source set.
narratives.UserStory: As an agent loading framework rules, I want AGENTS.md and main.md directives represented in the rules pack, so that I can slice the full rule corpus from canonical JSON instead of only the coding directives.

narrative.Acceptance: The rules pack JSON stores directive entries sourced from AGENTS.md and main.md in addition to the coding directives.
The rules pack stores non-null bodies for rule source documents beyond the single coding/testing.md proof entry.
Running `task packs:slice rules by-domain` returns the new AGENTS.md/main.md domains and `task verify:pack-drift` validates without drift.

expected_outputs: Rules pack entries sourced from AGENTS.md and main.md
Design note resolving the agents:refresh managed-section interaction
swarm.missing_traces_justification: Framework-internal packs:slice v2 work traced to GitHub issue #1637; schema enrichment portion deferred to #748; no specification.vbrief.json spec-section applies.

references.title: Issue #1637: feat(packs): packs:slice v2 -- remaining lessons slices + skills/rules/strategies pack surfaces
